content: Ai-summary fixes must propagate across all surfaces: <meta name="ai-summary">, <meta name="description">, and JSON-LD WebPage description (ICP-014 exact match). Phase 3.2b found 17 ships where ai-summary was already specific but boilerplate persisted in description/JSON-LD — phase3-2b-propagate.cjs copies the good ai-summary down. Never fix only the ai-summary tag.

verification_meta.rationale: Protected operator anchor — household weight signal.
